Jayden Burrows

Download ResumeEmail
  • 👨‍💻 Current Role :
    Data Engineer at Fanatics, Hyderabad

What I Do

Data Engineer

I specialise in building robust data pipelines on <strong>Azure</strong> cloud. With 6+ years of experience in ETL/ELT, I design and optimise large-scale data workflows using PySpark, Azure Data Factory, Databricks, and Delta Lake. Passionate about turning raw data into reliable, actionable insights.

Otaku

An Otaku at heart — deeply passionate about anime, manga, and the rich storytelling traditions of Japanese pop culture. I enjoy fan communities, exploring new series, and finding the parallels between epic narratives and the craft of building software.

Learner

Continuously evolving — whether it's a new cloud service, a programming paradigm, or Vedic philosophy. I thrive in fast-paced environments and love tackling real-world problems with elegant, well-crafted solutions.

Experience

FanaticsCurrent
Data Engineer
Hyderabad, Telangana, India 2025 – Present

Building and maintaining large-scale retail data pipelines on Azure cloud. Working with PySpark, Azure Data Factory, and Databricks to enable data-driven decision-making across the organisation.

Fractal Analytics
Data Engineer
Gurugram, Haryana, India 2023 – 2025

Designed and delivered cloud-based data engineering solutions and ETL automation on Azure, serving enterprise analytics clients across multiple industry verticals.

Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
Software Engineer
Pune, Maharashtra, India 2021 – 2023

Full-stack development and backend services — building web applications with Node.js, Python, and SQL across diverse industry domains.
